# Scoped Copilot Instructions

This folder contains scoped instruction files for common workflows in this repository.

Files:
- `content.instructions.md`: guidance for markdown model content and frontmatter consistency.
- `ui.instructions.md`: guidance for Astro components/pages/layout UI changes.
- `schema.instructions.md`: guidance for content schema evolution and propagation.
- `deploy.instructions.md`: guidance for Astro build and Netlify deployment configuration changes.

How to use:
- Keep these files concise and update them when project conventions change.
- When asking Copilot to perform a task, mention the scope explicitly (content, UI, or schema) to bias toward the matching instruction file.
